action.reasoning: Observation: Best test bacc = 0.6448 with img_size=252, 7 epochs DINOv2. Squirrel/bird still weak. Used ~17 min on training so far. Have 2.69h left and 22 iters. Analysis: Val bacc was 0.842 but test is 0.645 - large domain gap. Strategies to try: (1) Update predict.py to also use img_size=252 (currently it uses 224 - mismatch with training!). This is a critical bug. (2) Multi-scale TTA. Decision: First fix predict.py to use img_size=252 (matches training). Re-submit eval using same checkpoint. This should give a boost without retraining.
action.command: ls checkpoints/ && python -c "import torch; c=torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu'); print(list(c.keys())); print('img_size:', c.get('img_size'))"
